title: BreakingChange
description: A single change between two versions of an API specification, classified by severity and tied to the affected operation, schema, or field.

id.description: Stable identifier for the change, suitable for referencing in changelogs and migration guides.

from_version.description: Version identifier of the prior specification.

to_version.description: Version identifier of the new specification.

severity.description: Severity classification of the change. Maps to oasdiff and Optic conventions.

category.description: Category of change against the API surface.

path.description: API path or operation affected by the change.

location.description: JSON Pointer or schema location of the change.

description.example: Property status was removed from PaymentIntent response.

migration.description: Migration guidance for consumers, if any.
migration.example: Consumers should read latest_charge.status instead of payment_intent.status.

detected_by.description: Tool that detected and classified the change.
